Deprecated Map<String,Object> methods in ExploreResponseAssembler are still present and test-coupled, blocking cleanup of the dual API surface
collocateResultToFullMap returns Map<String,Object> for /api/bcql while all other endpoints use typed Jackson records
collocateResultToExampleMap is dead code — its typed replacement exists but the Map-based method was never removed

items.primary_command: address design quality issues from AI code review

members.summary: Dead private response-building cluster (BaseEnvelope record + two methods) in ExplorationHandlers never called by any handler
10-line Javadoc on CROSS_RELATIONAL String constant over-explains a trivial sentinel value
Nosy debug log prints routine 'center' request field with no diagnostic value in parseRadialRequest

items.primary_command: address design quality issues from AI code review

members.summary: buildComparisonResponse takes three bare scalar parameters (top, minShared, minLogDice) that are already bundled as SharedExploreParams inside ExplorationHandlers
buildExamplesResponse has 7 parameters including an awkward @Nullable Boolean fallback
buildMultiSeedResponseEnvelope and buildBaseResponseEnvelope are private methods in ExplorationHandlers that are never called
Deprecated Map-based assembly methods (populateExploreResponse, populateComparisonResponse) coexist with typed-record builders and are still exercised by tests
ExploreResponse encodes two mutually exclusive JSON shapes (single-seed vs multi-seed) in one record via nullable discriminator fields

items.primary_command: address design quality issues from AI code review

items.summary: Wildcard CORS origin is only warned about at startup, not prevented; any operator misconfiguration silently opens all origins

evidence: warnIfWildcardCors() calls logger.warn(...) when cors.allow.origin is '*' but returns normally, allowing the server to start with unrestricted CORS.
The class Javadoc says any bind-address change requires an auth layer, but does not say that wildcard CORS is equally dangerous when the bind address is changed.
detail.suggestion: In warnIfWildcardCors(), throw an IllegalStateException (or at minimum log at ERROR level) when the system property is '*' and the server is not in an explicitly acknowledged dev mode. Alternatively, document wildcard as an accepted risk with an explicit --allow-wildcard-cors flag so it is a conscious opt-in.

members.summary: executeDependencyPattern silently returns empty list for null deprel despite interface implying it is required
ExplorationService interface methods lack @throws documentation for IllegalArgumentException paths visible to callers

items.primary_command: address design quality issues from AI code review

members.summary: ExamplesResponse is a package-private record in api/ while all sibling response types are public records in api/model/
ExplorationHandlers contains dead private Map-builder helpers (buildMultiSeedResponseEnvelope, buildBaseResponseEnvelope) that were superseded by ExploreResponseAssembler typed-record methods

items.primary_command: address design quality issues from AI code review

members.summary: api.ExplorationHandlers constructs domain option objects (ExplorationOptions, SingleSeedExplorationOptions, FetchExamplesOptions) from raw HTTP parameters, placing domain model instantiation inside the HTTP layer

ExplorationHandlers retains two dead private response-building methods (buildBaseResponseEnvelope, buildMultiSeedResponseEnvelope) that were not removed when response assembly was consolidated into ExploreResponseAssembler
ExplorationService SPI exposes config.RelationConfig in its method signatures, forcing the api layer to import and resolve config objects before crossing the service boundary

items.primary_command: address design quality issues from AI code review

items.summary: com.sun.net.httpserver used pervasively across the entire API layer instead of a stable third-party HTTP server

evidence: import com.sun.net.httpserver.HttpExchange appears in 6 handler files and HttpApiUtils.java
pom.xml maven-compiler-plugin comment notes a TODO: 'consider migrating to Undertow or Jetty if a multi-module build, custom classloader environment, or EE-style deployment is ever needed'
detail.suggestion: Replace com.sun.net.httpserver with a stable third-party HTTP server such as Undertow (lightweight, no container required) or Jetty Embedded. The API surface touched is concentrated in WordSketchApiServer and HttpApiUtils, so a shim/adapter approach can isolate the migration to those two files before touching the handlers.

items.summary: Dead private helper methods buildBaseResponseEnvelope/buildMultiSeedResponseEnvelope in ExplorationHandlers are never called

evidence: buildBaseResponseEnvelope (line 228) and buildMultiSeedResponseEnvelope (line 215) are private methods that assemble a Map<String,Object> response envelope

All four handler methods (handleSemanticFieldExplore, handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti, handleSemanticFieldComparison, handleSemanticFieldExamples) delegate to ExploreResponseAssembler instead — none call these private methods
The BaseEnvelope record (line 207) exists solely to support these unreachable helpers
A developer reading the class sees two competing assembly paths with no indication which is canonical
detail.suggestion: Delete buildBaseResponseEnvelope, buildMultiSeedResponseEnvelope, and the BaseEnvelope record. They are dead code following the refactoring that moved response assembly to ExploreResponseAssembler. The class comment on handleSemanticFieldComparison correctly describes the real path.

narrative.headline: ⚠ 2 security issues — review before other cleanup. Score shifted 3.4 pts — this is normal after structural changes. Rescan after your next fix to see the real trend. (45 review issues — run `desloppify show review --status open`)

actions.description: 8 boilerplate_duplication issues — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes

If you cannot fix an item, report it and move to the next one.
For cluster items: if the autofix_hint finds 0 results, drill into individual issues with the primary_command.

clusters.name: contract_gaps
clusters.description: Align annotation contracts and document exception flows across CollocateQueryHelper, WordSketchApiServer, CollocateResult, and BlackLabSnippetParser

clusters.name: naming_consistency
clusters.description: Align vocabulary between Java names and observable contracts: RelationEdgeType labels, ExplorationService method name, CollocateProfileComparator field name

clusters.name: logic_clarity_r44
clusters.description: Reduce duplicated logic and side-effect footprint: duplicate executeBcqlQuery branches, dual output maps, missing parse method, unchecked cast

clusters.name: api_coherence_r44
clusters.description: Align API surface ergonomics: fetchExamples raw int param, ExplorationResult 6-positional factory, SemanticFieldExplorer passthrough delegation

clusters.name: service_boundary
clusters.description: Push concerns to correct layers: IOException through service boundary, domain validation at HTTP seam, CROSS_RELATIONAL sentinel, dual abstraction depth in API handlers

clusters.name: model_structure
clusters.description: Normalize model package layout: move sketch result types to model/sketch/, resolve viz/ one-class package

clusters.name: exploration_architecture
clusters.description: Split ExplorationService into three focused interfaces: SketchService, ExploreService, CompareService, each with a single return type

clusters.name: error_consistency_r44
clusters.description: Document or normalize GrammarConfigLoader exception type split (ISE for IO errors vs IAE for structural errors)

clusters.name: type_safety_systemic
clusters.description: Replace Map<String,Object> response assembly with typed DTOs across the entire API layer

clusters.name: test_gaps_r44
clusters.description: Add missing direct tests for SingleSeedExplorer four-phase algorithm and fix comparison_missing_seeds test to assert HTTP 400 not raw IAE

clusters.name: auto/review-convention_outlier
clusters.description: Address 2 convention_outlier review issues

clusters.name: auto/review-cross_module_architecture
clusters.description: Address 3 cross_module_architecture review issues

clusters.name: explore-response-assembler-migration
clusters.description: Migrate ExploreResponseAssembler comparison path from void-mutation Map pattern to typed ComparisonResponse record, matching the existing ExploreResponse/ExamplesResponse typed pattern used by other paths, and remove the dead collocateResultToExampleMap method and deprecated populateExploreResponse

clusters.name: query-naming-clarity
clusters.description: Rename two misleading methods in the query package: buildBcqlWithLemmaSubstitution (prepends, does not substitute) and executeCollocateSearchWithContent (content means stored XML fields, not generic content)

clusters.name: radialplot-field-naming
clusters.description: Rename Collocate record fields in RadialPlot.java to eliminate the confusing radius/circleRadius ambiguity: radius (orbital layout distance) becomes orbitRadius, circleRadius (score-based glyph size) becomes glyphRadius

clusters.name: null-annotation-completeness
clusters.description: Add missing null-safety annotations in two files: @Nullable on BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeCollocations lemma override parameter to match the interface declaration, and @NonNull on GrammarConfigSerializer.toJson method parameters

clusters.name: exploration-magic-constant
clusters.description: Extract the unexplained 1/3 magic ratio in SingleSeedExplorer.identifyCoreCollocates to a named constant CORE_COLLOCATE_NOUN_RATIO with an explanatory Javadoc comment describing why one-third coverage defines a core collocate

clusters.name: query-layer-test-coverage
clusters.description: Improve CI-runnable test coverage for the query layer: add mock-based tests for BlackLabQueryExecutor core query methods via CollocateQueryPort, add ConlluConverter unit tests that run without the YAML format config file, and remove the nullable test-seam constructor from CollocateQueryHelper

clusters.name: auto/review-high_level_elegance
clusters.description: Address 2 high_level_elegance review issues

clusters.name: auto/review-abstraction_fitness
clusters.description: Address 3 abstraction_fitness review issues

clusters.name: auto/review-ai_generated_debt
clusters.description: Address 3 ai_generated_debt review issues

clusters.name: auto/review-incomplete_migration
clusters.description: Address 2 incomplete_migration review issues
